creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

devel/apr and www/apache22 install files into the same place if you do 
not have WITH_APR_FROM_PORTS=yes.  So yes, they do *now* correct 
CONFLICT. Using the bundled www/apache22 apr will be desupported in 
weeks not months. This is invalid
